{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Visiri Combat Artist
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|A [[Visiri Combat Artist]] is a role or profession.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c12">''The Knight'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Visiri]] Combat Artists are fighters.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c29">''The Knight'', chapter 29</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon concepts]]
